title: Four-Extremity Neurostimulation Using Two Cervical Octapolar Leads and High Frequency of 10 kHz
study_question: Can high-frequency 10-kHz spinal cord stimulation achieve four-extremity pain relief without paresthesias?
population_assessed: 29-year-old male with C3 fracture, central cord lesion, bilateral upper and lower extremity neuropathic pain.
outcome_measures: Numeric rating scale pain score, opioid usage, functional improvement
inclusion_criteria: Patient with bilateral upper and lower extremity neuropathic pain refractory to conventional management.
answer_to_study_question: High-frequency 10-kHz SCS achieved 70-80% pain reduction in all four extremities without paresthesias, reducing NRS from 8 to 2.
